languages.text: "Пусть диспуты с автохтонными обитателями весьма захватывающи, но я желал бы вернуться в Сектор Бионика при первой возможности. Что мы с Нунциусом можем сделать для того, чтобы приблизить это мгновение?"
"While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"
languages.original_text: "Пусть диспуты с автохтонными обитателями весьма захватывающи, но я желал бы вернуться в Сектор Бионика при первой возможности. Что мы с Нунциусом можем сделать для того, чтобы приблизить это мгновение?"

traits.locale_text: "While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"
"While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"
"While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"

languages.text: «Aunque las disputas con los habitantes autóctonos son fascinantes, quiero volver cuanto antes al Sector Bionica. ¿Cómo podemos contribuir Nuncius y yo a que se produzca antes ese momento?».
languages.original_text: "While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"

traits.locale_text: «Aunque las disputas con los habitantes autóctonos son fascinantes, quiero volver cuanto antes al Sector Bionica. ¿Cómo podemos contribuir Nuncius y yo a que se produzca antes ese momento?».

languages.text: “与当地原住民进行讨论固然愉悦，但我仍希望能够尽早回到仿生区。我和努恩修斯需要做些什么，才能让返程的那一刻尽早到来？”
languages.original_text: "While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"

traits.locale_text: “与当地原住民进行讨论固然愉悦，但我仍希望能够尽早回到仿生区。我和努恩修斯需要做些什么，才能让返程的那一刻尽早到来？”

languages.text: « Les débats avec les autochtones sont certes fascinants, mais je souhaite retourner au secteur Bionica au plus vite. Que pouvons-nous faire, Nuncius et moi, pour accélérer notre retour ? »
languages.original_text: "While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"

traits.locale_text: « Les débats avec les autochtones sont certes fascinants, mais je souhaite retourner au secteur Bionica au plus vite. Que pouvons-nous faire, Nuncius et moi, pour accélérer notre retour ? »

languages.text: "Yerli halkla tartışmak epey ilginç olsa da ilk fırsatta Sektör Biyonika'ya dönmek istiyorum. Bunun bir an evvel gerçekleşmesi için Nuncius ve ben ne yapabiliriz?"
languages.original_text: "While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"

traits.locale_text: "Yerli halkla tartışmak epey ilginç olsa da ilk fırsatta Sektör Biyonika'ya dönmek istiyorum. Bunun bir an evvel gerçekleşmesi için Nuncius ve ben ne yapabiliriz?"

languages.text: 「原住民との論争はこの上なく興味深いものですが、私はできるだけ早くセクター・ビオニカへ戻りたいのです。その瞬間を近づけるために、ヌンキウスと私に何ができるでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"

traits.locale_text: 「原住民との論争はこの上なく興味深いものですが、私はできるだけ早くセクター・ビオニカへ戻りたいのです。その瞬間を近づけるために、ヌンキウスと私に何ができるでしょうか？」

languages.text: "Obschon Dispute mit den autochtonen Bewohnern überaus anregend sind, möchte ich schnellstmöglich zurück in den Sektor Bionica. Was können Nuncius und ich tun, um unsere Rückkehr zu beschleunigen?"
languages.original_text: "While disputations with the autochthonous inhabitants are most engaging, I wish to return to the Sector Bionica at the earliest opportunity. What can Nuncius and I do to bring that moment closer?"

traits.locale_text: "Obschon Dispute mit den autochtonen Bewohnern überaus anregend sind, möchte ich schnellstmöglich zurück in den Sektor Bionica. Was können Nuncius und ich tun, um unsere Rückkehr zu beschleunigen?"
